verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Marching on in the light of God, Marching on, I am marching on; Up the path that the Master trod, Marching, marching on.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: A robe of white, a crown of gold, A harp, a home, a mansion fair, A victor's palm, a joy untold, Are mine when I get there.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Marching on thro' the hosts of sin, Marching on, I am marching on; Vict'ry's mine, while I've Christ within, Marching, marching on.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Marching on while the skeptics sneer, Marching on, I am marching on; Perfect love casteth out all fear, Marching, marching on.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Marching on with the flag unfurled, Marching on, I am marching on; Preaching Christ to the dying world, Marching, marching on.
